sections.title: Coverage Summary by Crate
sections.content:
| Crate | Tests Found | Status | Priority |
|-------|-------------|--------|----------|
| `wifi-densepose-core` | 26 inline | Good | Low |
| `wifi-densepose-signal` | ~60 (validation only) | Moderate | **High** |
| `wifi-densepose-nn` | **0** | Critical | **P1** |
| `wifi-densepose-train` | ~60 (config/dataset) | Moderate | High |
| `wifi-densepose-mat` | 1 integration test | Critical | **P1** |
| `wifi-densepose-ruvector` | **0** | Critical | **P1** |
| `wifi-densepose-sensing-server` | 4 integration tests | Moderate | High |
| `wifi-densepose-wasm` | 3 compliance tests | Low | Low |

---

sections.title: 1. `wifi-densepose-nn` — Zero test coverage
2. `wifi-densepose-mat` — Disaster response safety gaps
3. `wifi-densepose-ruvector` — Zero coverage on all 5 integration modules
4. `wifi-densepose-signal` — RuvSense module untested
5. `wifi-densepose-train` — Geometry encoder and rapid adaptation untested
6. `wifi-densepose-sensing-server` — Auth and semantic analyzers
Cross-Cutting Gap Summary
sections.content:
| Gap Category | Severity | Affects | Recommended Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| `wifi-densepose-nn` has 0 tests | **Critical** | Inference pipeline | Add `tests/inference_tests.rs` per skeleton above |
| `wifi-densepose-ruvector` has 0 tests | **Critical** | Viewpoint fusion, sketches | Add `tests/viewpoint_tests.rs` |
| MAT disaster response missing edge cases | **Critical** | 0 BPM, agonal breathing, dedup | Add `tests/detection_edge_cases.rs` |
| Signal RuvSense 28 modules untested | High | Core sensing logic | Add `tests/ruvsense_tests.rs` |
| NN error paths (bad model files, OOM) | High | Production reliability | Add error path tests to nn |
| Train geometry + rapid adapt = 0 tests | High | Domain adaptation | Add `tests/test_geometry.rs` |
| Server auth token validation | High | Security boundary | Add `tests/auth_tests.rs` |
| NaN/Inf propagation in f32 pipelines | High | All numeric crates | Add boundary tests per module |
| Concurrent state under Arc<Mutex> | Medium | sensing-server, mat | Add contention tests |

The highest-ROI starting point is `wifi-densepose-nn` and `wifi-densepose-mat` — the nn crate has zero tests on the core inference pipeline, and mat covers life-safety scenarios where classification errors have real consequences.
